CurrentIssues.ID: LongParameterList:Facility.kt$Facility$( @Id val id: String?, @Indexed @Field("code") val code: String, @Field("name") val name: String, @Indexed @Field("gu") val gu: String, @Field("type") val type: String, @Field("address") val address: String, @GeoSpatialIndexed(type = GeoSpatialIndexType.GEO_2DSPHERE) @Field("location") val location: Point, @Field("parking") val parking: Boolean, @Field("tel") val tel: String, @Field("home_page") val homePage: String, @Field("edu_yn") val eduYn: Boolean, @Field("meta") val meta: Map<String, String>, @Field("owner_user_id") var ownerUserId: Long? = null, )
